title: StoreyDrift
description: StoreyDrift: The relative lateral displacement between consecutive floors.

Direction.description: Direction of the storey lateral displacement. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Ratio.description: Ratio between the storey drift and the storey height. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
